name: Fillings for Strudel
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core, and slice the apples thinly or dice them.
2. Place the sliced apples in a row at one end of the stretched dough.
3. Top the apples with walnuts, raisins, sugar, and cinnamon.
4. Brush the surface of all the dough with oil. Sprinkle evenly with sugar, cinnamon, and breadcrumbs.
5. Roll up the dough using a kitchen towel to help shape it.
6. Transfer the roll onto an oiled cookie sheet. Make slits every 3 inches along the length.
7. Baste the strudel with oil.
8. Bake at 300°F for 1 hour.
9. Remove from the oven and carefully lift the strudel off the baking sheet to prevent sticking (due to sugar).
10. Sprinkle confectioner's sugar on top of the finished strudel.
